data.label: GET /get-issuers (Webhook)
data.description: Sync webhook that acts as the integration entry point. It accepts inbound HTTP requests and triggers the GetIssuers pipeline, forwarding a response back to the caller once all downstream steps have completed.
steps: Exposes a public HTTPS endpoint on the Versori platform
Operates in sync (request-reply) mode — the caller waits for a response
CORS is enabled, permitting cross-origin browser requests
Routes execution into the read-variables step before any external call is made

data.label: Read & Validate Variables
data.description: Reads the three required integration variables — bearerToken, taxYear, and xCorrelationId — from the platform activation context and validates that none are missing. A missing variable causes the workflow to abort with a descriptive error before any external call is attempted.
steps: Reads bearerToken, taxYear, and xCorrelationId from integration variables
Throws a descriptive error if any required variable is absent
Logs resolved taxYear and xCorrelationId for audit purposes
Passes the validated variable set to the downstream HTTP step

data.label: Call Avalara — ListIssuers
data.description: Performs a GET request to the Avalara 1099 ListIssuers endpoint via the avalara_1099_api connection, applying taxYear as an OData $filter and attaching the bearer token and correlation ID as headers. On a non-2xx response the full error body is captured and surfaced as a workflow error; on success the paginated issuer list is returned directly to the webhook caller.
steps: Sets Authorization: Bearer {bearerToken}, avalara-version: 2.0, and X-Correlation-Id headers
Executes GET /avalara1099/1099/issuers via the avalara_1099_api connection
On error: logs HTTP status + body and throws to abort the workflow
On success: returns the raw PaginatedIssuersResult (value[], @recordSetCount, @nextLink) to the caller
